what is the difference between ron and mon
items.pred_answer: RON is measured under mild conditions and is higher, MON is measured under severe conditions and is lower; RON is used in most countries, MON is used with RON to calculate AKI in the U.S.

items.question: who rides so late through night and wind
items.pred_answer: The line "Who rides so late through night and wind?" is from Johann Wolfgang von Goethe's poem "Erlkönig" (also known as "The Erlking" or "The Elf-King"). The poem, written in 1782, depicts a father riding through the night with his sick child, who is being lured to his death by the supernatural Erlking. It is one of Goethe's most famous works and was famously set to music by Franz Schubert as an art song.
